import re
from django.core.validators import URLValidator

def test_ipv6_regex_string_supports_mixed_case():
    # The regex string itself should support mixed-case hex digits
    # without relying on re.IGNORECASE, because re.IGNORECASE might 
    # not be properly propagated or might be missing in some contexts.
    pattern = URLValidator.ipv6_re
    match = re.match(pattern, '[2001:DB8::1]')
    assert match is not None, f"Pattern {pattern} does not match '[2001:DB8::1]'"

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import pytest
    import sys
    sys.exit(pytest.main(["-v", __file__]))
